{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1774258239,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019d1a0815547c6da8a9dafe1d22535b","conversation_id":"019d1a07eab2761ba8002135a29acbd2","tool_call_id":"tooluse_A7XHqMUc6BgtBd1vtWS4Rs","result":{},"display_name":"读取文件"},"messageId":"019d1a0815547c6da8a9dafe1d22535b","toolCallId":"tooluse_A7XHqMUc6BgtBd1vtWS4Rs","content":"{\"content\": \"package com.example.p2pconnect\\n\\nimport android.Manifest\\nimport android.annotation.SuppressLint\\nimport android.content.pm.PackageManager\\nimport android.net.wifi.p2p.WifiP2pDevice\\nimport android.net.wifi.p2p.WifiP2pInfo\\nimport android.os.Build\\nimport android.os.Bundle\\nimport android.widget.ArrayAdapter\\nimport android.widget.ListView\\nimport android.widget.Toast\\nimport androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity\\nimport androidx.core.app.ActivityCompat\\nimport androidx.core.content.ContextCompat\\nimport androidx.lifecycle.lifecycleScope\\nimport com.example.p2pconnect.databinding.ActivityMainBinding\\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers\\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.launch\\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.withContext\\nimport java.io.IOException\\nimport java.net.InetSocketAddress\\nimport java.net.Socket\\n\\nclass MainActivity : AppCompatActivity(), WifiDirectManager.ConnectionListener {\\n\\n private lateinit var binding: ActivityMainBinding\\n private lateinit var wifiDirectManager: WifiDirectManager\\n private lateinit var deviceListView: ListView\\n private val deviceList = mutableListOf<WifiP2pDevice>()\\n private lateinit var deviceAdapter: ArrayAdapter<String>\\n private var selectedDevice: WifiP2pDevice? = null\\n\\n private var connectTryCount = 0\\n\\n // 权限列表\\n private val requiredPermissions: Array<String>\\n get() = if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.TIRAMISU) {\\n arrayOf(Manifest.permission.NEARBY_WIFI_DEVICES)\\n } else {\\n arrayOf(\\n Manifest.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION,\\n Manifest.permission.ACCESS_WIFI_STATE,\\n Manifest.permission.CHANGE_WIFI_STATE\\n )\\n }\\n\\n @SuppressLint(\\\"MissingPermission\\\")\\n override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {\\n super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)\\n binding = ActivityMainBinding.inflate(layoutInflater)\\n setContentView(binding.root)\\n\\n // 初始化设备列表\\n deviceListView = binding.deviceListView\\n deviceAdapter = ArrayAdapter(this, android.R.layout.simple_list_item_single_choice, mutableListOf<String>())\\n deviceListView.adapter = deviceAdapter\\n deviceListView.choiceMode = ListView.CHOICE_MODE_SINGLE\\n\\n if (checkPermissions()) {\\n initWifiDirect()\\n }\\n\\n binding.btnDiscover.setOnClickListener {\\n clearStatus()\\n if (checkPermissions()) {\\n clearDeviceList()\\n appendStatus(\\\"正在扫描设备...\\\")\\n wifiDirectManager.discoverPeers()\\n }\\n }\\n\\n binding.btnConnect.setOnClickListener {\\n clearStatus()\\n val selectedPosition = deviceListView.checkedItemPosition\\n if (selectedPosition != ListView.INVALID_POSITION && selectedPosition < deviceList.size) {\\n selectedDevice = deviceList[selectedPosition]\\n appendStatus(\\\"正在连接 ${selectedDevice!!.deviceName}...\\\")\\n wifiDirectManager.connectToDevice(selectedDevice!!)\\n } else {\\n Toast.makeText(this, \\\"请先选择一个设备\\\", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 设备列表点击事件\\n deviceListView.setOnItemClickListener { _, _, position, _ ->\\n selectedDevice = deviceList[position]\\n clearStatus()\\n appendStatus(\\\"已选择设备：${selectedDevice!!.deviceName}\\\")\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private fun initWifiDirect() {\\n wifiDirectManager = WifiDirectManager(this, this)\\n }\\n\\n private fun checkPermissions(): Boolean {\\n val missingPermissions = requiredPermissions.filter {\\n ContextCompat.checkSelfPermission(this, it) != PackageManager.PERMISSION_GRANTED\\n }\\n\\n return if (missingPermissions.isEmpty()) {\\n true\\n } else {\\n ActivityCompat.requestPermissions(this, missingPermissions.toTypedArray(), 1001)\\n false\\n }\\n }\\n\\n override fun onRequestPermissionsResult(requestCode: Int, permissions: Array<out String>, grantResults: IntArray) {\\n super.onRequestPermissionsResult(requestCode, permissions, grantResults)\\n if (requestCode == 1001 && grantResults.all { it == PackageManager.PERMISSION_GRANTED }) {\\n initWifiDirect()\\n } else {\\n Toast.makeText(this, \\\"权限被拒绝，无法使用 WiFi Direct\\\", Toast.LENGTH_LONG).show()\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 回调：发现设备\\n override fun onDeviceFound(device: WifiP2pDevice) {\\n // 避免重复添加相同设备\\n if (deviceList.none { it.deviceAddress == device.deviceAddress }) {\\n clearStatus()\\n deviceList.add(device)\\n runOnUiThread {\\n deviceAdapter.add(\\\"${device.deviceName} (${device.deviceAddress})\\\")\\n deviceAdapter.notifyDataSetChanged()\\n appendStatus(\\\"发现设备：${device.deviceName}\\\")\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 回调：连接成功\\n override fun onConnectionSuccess(info: WifiP2pInfo) {\\n val goIp = info.groupOwnerAddress?.hostAddress ?: return\\n runOnUiThread {\\n appendStatus(\\\"\\\\n连接成功！\\\\nGO IP: $goIp\\\")\\n // 启动协程进行 TCP 通信\\n testTcpConnection(goIp)\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 回调：连接失败，三次重试，给予连接一定时间\\n override fun onConnectionFailed() {\\n connectTryCount++;\\n if (connectTryCount < 3) {\\n return\\n }\\n runOnUiThread { appendStatus(\\\"\\\\n连接失败\\\") }\\n }\\n\\n // 清空设备列表\\n private fun clearDeviceList() {\\n deviceList.clear()\\n runOnUiThread {\\n deviceAdapter.clear()\\n deviceAdapter.notifyDataSetChanged()\\n selectedDevice = null\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 协程处理网络 IO\\n private fun testTcpConnection(hostIp: String) {\\n lifecycleScope.launch {\\n appendStatus(\\\"\\\\n正在尝试 TCP 通信...\\\")\\n val result = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {\\n sendTcpMessage(hostIp, 50001, \\\"Hello from Android Kotlin!\\\")\\n }\\n appendStatus(\\\"\\\\n通信结果：$result\\\")\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private fun sendTcpMessage(host: String, port: Int, message: String): String {\\n val socket = Socket()\\n return try {\\n socket.connect(InetSocketAddress(host, port), 5000)\\n val outputStream = socket.getOutputStream()\\n val inputStream = socket.getInputStream()\\n\\n // 发送\\n outputStream.write(message.toByteArray())\\n outputStream.flush()\\n\\n // 接收响应\\n val buffer = ByteArray(1024)\\n val read = inputStream.read(buffer)\\n if (read > 0) \\\"收到响应：${String(buffer, 0, read)}\\\" else \\\"发送成功，无响应\\\"\\n } catch (e: IOException) {\\n \\\"通信错误：${e.message}\\\"\\n } finally {\\n try { socket.close() } catch (e: IOException) {}\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private fun appendStatus(text: String) {\\n binding.statusText.append(text)\\n }\\n\\n private fun clearStatus() {\\n binding.statusText.text = \\\"\\\"\\n }\\n\\n override fun onDestroy() {\\n super.onDestroy()\\n wifiDirectManager.onDestroy()\\n }\\n}\\n... EOF no more lines ...\\n\", \"fileSize\": \"6.44 KB\", \"isBigFile\": false, \"totalLines\": 207}"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_ARGS","timestamp":1774258239,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019d1a0815547c6da8a9dafe1d22535b","conversation_id":"019d1a07eab2761ba8002135a29acbd2","tool_call_id":"tooluse_Upn3qt3qrj1nKCSRNZTVps","document":{"sub_content":"WifiDirectManager.kt","sub_content_event":"open_editor","sub_content_event_value":"/Users/junjiecui/AndroidStudioProjects/P2PConnect/app/src/main/java/com/example/p2pconnect/WifiDirectManager.kt","sub_content_tip":"/Users/junjiecui/AndroidStudioProjects/P2PConnect/app/src/main/java/com/example/p2pconnect/WifiDirectManager.kt"}},"toolCallId":"tooluse_Upn3qt3qrj1nKCSRNZTVps","delta":"{\"explanation\": \"读取WifiDirectManager.kt了解WiFi Direct连接管理的实现。\", \"path\": \"/Users/junjiecui/AndroidStudioProjects/P2PConnect/app/src/main/java/com/example/p2pconnect/WifiDirectManager.kt\"}"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1774258239,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019d1a0815547c6da8a9dafe1d22535b","conversation_id":"019d1a07eab2761ba8002135a29acbd2","tool_call_id":"tooluse_Upn3qt3qrj1nKCSRNZTVps","result":{},"display_name":"读取文件"},"messageId":"019d1a0815547c6da8a9dafe1d22535b","toolCallId":"tooluse_Upn3qt3qrj1nKCSRNZTVps","content":"{\"content\": \"package com.example.p2pconnect\\n\\nimport android.Manifest\\nimport android.content.BroadcastReceiver\\nimport android.content.Context\\nimport android.content.Intent\\nimport android.content.IntentFilter\\nimport android.net.MacAddress\\nimport android.net.wifi.WpsInfo\\nimport android.net.wifi.p2p.WifiP2pConfig\\nimport android.net.wifi.p2p.WifiP2pDevice\\nimport android.net.wifi.p2p.WifiP2pInfo\\nimport android.net.wifi.p2p.WifiP2pManager\\nimport android.os.Build\\nimport android.util.Log\\nimport androidx.annotation.RequiresApi\\nimport androidx.annotation.RequiresPermission\\n\\nclass WifiDirectManager(\\n private val context: Context,\\n private val listener: ConnectionListener\\n) : WifiP2pManager.ChannelListener {\\n\\n companion object {\\n private const val TAG = \\\"WifiDirectManager\\\"\\n }\\n\\n private val manager: WifiP2pManager =\\n context.getSystemService(Context.WIFI_P2P_SERVICE) as WifiP2pManager\\n private val channel: WifiP2pManager.Channel =\\n manager.initialize(context, context.mainLooper, this)\\n\\n private val receiver: BroadcastReceiver = object : BroadcastReceiver() {\\n @RequiresPermission(allOf = [Manifest.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION, Manifest.permission.NEARBY_WIFI_DEVICES])\\n override fun onReceive(context: Context, intent: Intent) {\\n when (intent.action) {\\n WifiP2pManager.WIFI_P2P_PEERS_CHANGED_ACTION -> {\\n manager.requestPeers(channel) { peerList ->\\n peerList.deviceList.forEach { device ->\\n Log.d(TAG, \\\"发现设备：${device.deviceName} (${device.deviceAddress})\\\")\\n listener.onDeviceFound(device)\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n WifiP2pManager.WIFI_P2P_CONNECTION_CHANGED_ACTION -> {\\n var failFlag = false\\n manager.requestConnectionInfo(channel) { info ->\\n if (info.groupFormed) {\\n manager.requestGroupInfo(channel) { groupInfo ->\\n Log.d(TAG, \\\"已连接到群组，群组名称：${groupInfo.networkName}\\\")\\n }\\n if (info.isGroupOwner) {\\n Log.d(TAG, \\\"连接成功：我是 GO，GO IP = ${info.groupOwnerAddress?.hostAddress}\\\")\\n } else {\\n Log.d(TAG, \\\"连接成功：我是 Client, GO IP = ${info.groupOwnerAddress?.hostAddress}\\\")\\n }\\n listener.onConnectionSuccess(info)\\n } else {\\n failFlag = true\\n Log.d(TAG, \\\"未连接到任何群组\\\")\\n }\\n }\\n if (failFlag) {\\n listener.onConnectionFailed()\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n interface ConnectionListener {\\n fun onDeviceFound(device: WifiP2pDevice)\\n fun onConnectionSuccess(info: WifiP2pInfo)\\n fun onConnectionFailed()\\n }\\n\\n init {\\n val intentFilter = IntentFilter().apply {\\n addAction(WifiP2pManager.WIFI_P2P_STATE_CHANGED_ACTION)\\n addAction(WifiP2pManager.WIFI_P2P_PEERS_CHANGED_ACTION)\\n addAction(WifiP2pManager.WIFI_P2P_CONNECTION_CHANGED_ACTION)\\n addAction(WifiP2pManager.WIFI_P2P_THIS_DEVICE_CHANGED_ACTION)\\n }\\n context.registerReceiver(receiver, intentFilter)\\n }\\n\\n @RequiresPermission(allOf = [Manifest.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION, Manifest.permission.NEARBY_WIFI_DEVICES])\\n fun discoverPeers() {\\n manager.discoverPeers(channel, object : WifiP2pManager.ActionListener {\\n override fun onSuccess() { Log.d(TAG, \\\"扫描启动成功\\\") }\\n override fun onFailure(reason: Int) { Log.e(TAG, \\\"扫描失败：$reason\\\") }\\n })\\n }\\n\\n @RequiresApi(Build.VERSION_CODES.Q)\\n @RequiresPermission(allOf = [Manifest.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION, Manifest.permission.NEARBY_WIFI_DEVICES])\\n fun connectToDevice(device: WifiP2pDevice) {\\n val config = WifiP2pConfig.Builder()\\n .setDeviceAddress(MacAddress.fromString(device.deviceAddress))\\n .build()\\n\\n\\n manager.connect(channel, config, object : WifiP2pManager.ActionListener {\\n override fun onSuccess() { Log.d(TAG, \\\"连接请求已发送\\\") }\\n override fun onFailure(reason: Int) { Log.e(TAG, \\\"连接请求失败：$reason\\\") }\\n })\\n }\\n\\n fun onDestroy() {\\n try {\\n context.unregisterReceiver(receiver)\\n } catch (e: Exception) {\\n Log.e(TAG, \\\"Receiver 注销失败\\\", e)\\n }\\n }\\n\\n override fun onChannelDisconnected() {\\n Log.e(TAG, \\\"WiFi Direct Channel 断开\\\")\\n }\\n}\\n... EOF no more lines ...\\n\", \"fileSize\": \"4.18 KB\", \"isBigFile\": false, \"totalLines\": 120}"}

{"messageId":"019d1a0815547c6da8a9dafe1d22535b","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019d1a0815547c6da8a9dafe1d22535b","conversation_id":"019d1a07eab2761ba8002135a29acbd2","content":"现在我已经了解了所有代码。当前的逻辑是在 `onConnectionSuccess` 回调中自动调用 `testTcpConnection(goIp)`。需求是改为：连接成功后显示一个"TCP测试"按钮，用户点击后才进行TCP测试。

我需要做以下修改：

1. **布局文件**：添加一个"进行TCP测试"按钮（默认隐藏）
2. **MainActivity.kt**：
 - 连接成功后保存 GO IP，显示TCP测试按钮，不自动调用TCP测试
 - 添加TCP测试按钮的点击事件"},"timestamp":1774258245,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

\"package com.example.p2pconnect\\n\\nimport android.Manifest\\nimport android.annotation.SuppressLint\\nimport android.content.pm.PackageManager\\nimport android.net.wifi.p2p.WifiP2pDevice\\nimport android.net.wifi.p2p.WifiP2pInfo\\nimport android.os.Build\\nimport android.os.Bundle\\nimport android.view.View\\nimport android.widget.ArrayAdapter\\nimport android.widget.ListView\\nimport android.widget.Toast\\nimport androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity\\nimport androidx.core.app.ActivityCompat\\nimport androidx.core.content.ContextCompat\\nimport androidx.lifecycle.lifecycleScope\\nimport com.example.p2pconnect.databinding.ActivityMainBinding\\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers\\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.launch\\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.withContext\\nimport java.io.IOException\\nimport java.net.InetSocketAddress\\nimport java.net.Socket\\n\\nclass MainActivity : AppCompatActivity(), WifiDirectManager.ConnectionListener {\\n\\n private lateinit var binding: ActivityMainBinding\\n private lateinit var wifiDirectManager: WifiDirectManager\\n private lateinit var deviceListView: ListView\\n private val deviceList = mutableListOf<WifiP2pDevice>()\\n private lateinit var deviceAdapter: ArrayAdapter<String>\\n private var selectedDevice: WifiP2pDevice? = null\\n\\n private var connectTryCount = 0\\n private var connectedGoIp: String? = null\\n\\n // 权限列表\\n private val requiredPermissions: Array<String>\\n get() = if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.TIRAMISU) {\\n arrayOf(Manifest.permission.NEARBY_WIFI_DEVICES)\\n } else {\\n arrayOf(\\n Manifest.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION,\\n Manifest.permission.ACCESS_WIFI_STATE,\\n Manifest.permission.CHANGE_WIFI_STATE\\n )\\n }\\n\\n @SuppressLint(\\\"MissingPermission\\\")\\n override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {\\n super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)\\n binding = ActivityMainBinding.inflate(layoutInflater)\\n setContentView(binding.root)\\n\\n // 初始化设备列表\\n deviceListView = binding.deviceListView\\n deviceAdapter = ArrayAdapter(this, android.R.layout.simple_list_item_single_choice, mutableListOf<String>())\\n deviceListView.adapter = deviceAdapter\\n deviceListView.choiceMode = ListView.CHOICE_MODE_SINGLE\\n\\n if (checkPermissions()) {\\n initWifiDirect()\\n }\\n\\n binding.btnDiscover.setOnClickListener {\\n clearStatus()\\n if (checkPermissions()) {\\n clearDeviceList()\\n appendStatus(\\\"正在扫描设备...\\\")\\n wifiDirectManager.discoverPeers()\\n }\\n }\\n\\n binding.btnConnect.setOnClickListener {\\n clearStatus()\\n val selectedPosition = deviceListView.checkedItemPosition\\n if (selectedPosition != ListView.INVALID_POSITION && selectedPosition < deviceList.size) {\\n selectedDevice = deviceList[selectedPosition]\\n appendStatus(\\\"正在连接 ${selectedDevice!!.deviceName}...\\\")\\n wifiDirectManager.connectToDevice(selectedDevice!!)\\n } else {\\n Toast.makeText(this, \\\"请先选择一个设备\\\", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()\\n }\\n }\\n\\n binding.btnTcpTest.setOnClickListener {\\n connectedGoIp?.let { ip ->\\n testTcpConnection(ip)\\n } ?: Toast.makeText(this, \\\"尚未连接，请先连接设备\\\", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()\\n }\\n\\n // 设备列表点击事件\\n deviceListView.setOnItemClickListener { _, _, position, _ ->\\n selectedDevice = deviceList[position]\\n clearStatus()\\n appendStatus(\\\"已选择设备：${selectedDevice!!.deviceName}\\\")\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private fun initWifiDirect() {\\n wifiDirectManager = WifiDirectManager(this, this)\\n }\\n\\n private fun checkPermissions(): Boolean {\\n val missingPermissions = requiredPermissions.filter {\\n ContextCompat.checkSelfPermission(this, it) != PackageManager.PERMISSION_GRANTED\\n }\\n\\n return if (missingPermissions.isEmpty()) {\\n true\\n } else {\\n ActivityCompat.requestPermissions(this, missingPermissions.toTypedArray(), 1001)\\n false\\n }\\n }\\n\\n override fun onRequestPermissionsResult(requestCode: Int, permissions: Array<out String>, grantResults: IntArray) {\\n super.onRequestPermissionsResult(requestCode, permissions, grantResults)\\n if (requestCode == 1001 && grantResults.all { it == PackageManager.PERMISSION_GRANTED }) {\\n initWifiDirect()\\n } else {\\n Toast.makeText(this, \\\"权限被拒绝，无法使用 WiFi Direct\\\", Toast.LENGTH_LONG).show()\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 回调：发现设备\\n override fun onDeviceFound(device: WifiP2pDevice) {\\n // 避免重复添加相同设备\\n if (deviceList.none { it.deviceAddress == device.deviceAddress }) {\\n clearStatus()\\n deviceList.add(device)\\n runOnUiThread {\\n deviceAdapter.add(\\\"${device.deviceName} (${device.deviceAddress})\\\")\\n deviceAdapter.notifyDataSetChanged()\\n appendStatus(\\\"发现设备：${device.deviceName}\\\")\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 回调：连接成功\\n override fun onConnectionSuccess(info: WifiP2pInfo) {\\n val goIp = info.groupOwnerAddress?.hostAddress ?: return\\n connectedGoIp = goIp\\n runOnUiThread {\\n appendStatus(\\\"\\\\n连接成功！\\\\nGO IP: $goIp\\\")\\n // 显示TCP测试按钮，等待用户点击\\n binding.btnTcpTest.visibility = View.VISIBLE\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 回调：连接失败，三次重试，给予连接一定时间\\n override fun onConnectionFailed() {\\n connectTryCount++;\\n if (connectTryCount < 3) {\\n return\\n }\\n runOnUiThread { appendStatus(\\\"\\\\n连接失败\\\") }\\n }\\n\\n // 清空设备列表\\n private fun clearDeviceList() {\\n deviceList.clear()\\n runOnUiThread {\\n deviceAdapter.clear()\\n deviceAdapter.notifyDataSetChanged()\\n selectedDevice = null\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 协程处理网络 IO\\n private fun testTcpConnection(hostIp: String) {\\n lifecycleScope.launch {\\n appendStatus(\\\"\\\\n正在尝试 TCP 通信...\\\")\\n val result = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {\\n sendTcpMessage(hostIp, 50001, \\\"Hello from Android Kotlin!\\\")\\n }\\n appendStatus(\\\"\\\\n通信结果：$result\\\")\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private fun sendTcpMessage(host: String, port: Int, message: String): String {\\n val socket = Socket()\\n return try {\\n socket.connect(InetSocketAddress(host, port), 5000)\\n val outputStream = socket.getOutputStream()\\n val inputStream = socket.getInputStream()\\n\\n // 发送\\n outputStream.write(message.toByteArray())\\n outputStream.flush()\\n\\n // 接收响应\\n val buffer = ByteArray(1024)\\n val read = inputStream.read(buffer)\\n if (read > 0) \\\"收到响应：${String(buffer, 0, read)}\\\" else \\\"发送成功，无响应\\\"\\n } catch (e: IOException) {\\n \\\"通信错误：${e.message}\\\"\\n } finally {\\n try { socket.close() } catch (e: IOException) {}\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private fun appendStatus(text: String) {\\n binding.statusText.append(text)\\n }\\n\\n private fun clearStatus() {\\n binding.statusText.text = \\\"\\\"\\n }\\n\\n override fun onDestroy() {\\n super.onDestroy()\\n wifiDirectManager.onDestroy()\\n }\\n}\\n... EOF no more lines ...\\n\", \"fileSize\": \"6.77 KB\", \"isBigFile\": false, \"totalLines\": 216}"}

{"messageId":"019d1a0815547c6da8a9dafe1d22535b","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019d1a0815547c6da8a9dafe1d22535b","conversation_id":"019d1a07eab2761ba8002135a29acbd2","content":"所有修改已完成，代码验证正确。以下是修改总结：

## 修改内容

### 1. [activity_main.xml](/Users/junjiecui/AndroidStudioProjects/P2PConnect/app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml)

- 在"连接选中设备"按钮下方新增了一个 `btnTcpTest` 按钮，文字为"进行TCP测试"，默认 `visibility="gone"` 隐藏

### 2. [MainActivity.kt](/Users/junjiecui/AndroidStudioProjects/P2PConnect/app/src/main/java/com/example/p2pconnect/MainActivity.kt)

- 新增 `import android.view.View`
- 新增成员变量 `connectedGoIp: String?`，用于保存连接成功后的 GO IP 地址
- **`onConnectionSuccess` 回调**：连接成功后不再自动调用 `testTcpConnection(goIp)`，改为将 GO IP 保存到 `connectedGoIp`，并将"进行TCP测试"按钮设为可见
- **`btnTcpTest` 点击事件**：用户点击时，使用保存的 `connectedGoIp` 调用 `testTcpConnection()` 进行 TCP 通信测试；若尚未连接则提示"尚未连接，请先连接设备"

## 交互流程

```mermaid
flowchart TD
 A[扫描设备] --> B[选择设备]
 B --> C[点击"连接选中设备"]
 C --> D{连接结果}
 D -->|成功| E[显示GO IP + 显示"进行TCP测试"按钮]
 D -->|失败| F[显示连接失败]
 E --> G[用户点击"进行TCP测试"]
 G --> H[执行TCP通信测试]
 H --> I[显示通信结果]
```"},"timestamp":1774258277,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

entry.value:
# 需求文档
这是一个Android客户端，核心功能是进行wifi direct device discover，然后选择连接，连接后尝试tcp通信。我现在想把代码逻辑修改为：成功连接后，需要用户点击进行TCP测试按钮才进行tcp测试

option.name: question
option.value: 阅读需求文档，完成任务

option.name: title
option.value: WiFi直连设备扫描连接

{"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","content":"
用户想要修改现有的 WiFi Direct 连接功能，从自动连接发现的第一个设备改为支持扫描到多个设备，然后让用户点击选择连接。

从提供的 MainActivity.kt 文件内容来看，当前实现是：
1. 扫描设备时，只保存第一个发现的设备到 targetDevice
2. 连接按钮直接连接这个 targetDevice

我需要修改这个逻辑：
1. 扫描时应该收集所有发现的设备
2. 在 UI 上显示设备列表
3. 让用户可以选择要连接的设备

首先我需要查看当前的布局文件 activity_main.xml 来了解现有的 UI 结构，然后修改 MainActivity.kt 来支持多设备选择和连接功能。
"},"timestamp":1773660848,"type":"THINKING_TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","content":"
现在我看到当前的布局文件结构。当前只有一个 TextView 用于显示状态，两个按钮用于扫描和连接。我需要修改布局来支持设备列表显示和选择功能。

我需要：
1. 修改布局文件，添加一个 RecyclerView 或 ListView 来显示设备列表
2. 修改 MainActivity.kt 来支持多设备存储和选择连接

由于布局文件较小，我可以先修改布局文件，然后修改 MainActivity.kt。让我先修改布局文件。
"},"timestamp":1773660857,"type":"THINKING_TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1773660895,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","tool_call_id":"call_dbd996fc-9d37-4196-9e41-2886009d71c9","result":{},"display_name":"读取文件"},"messageId":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","toolCallId":"call_dbd996fc-9d37-4196-9e41-2886009d71c9","content":"{\"content\": \"package com.example.p2pconnect\\n\\nimport android.Manifest\\nimport android.content.BroadcastReceiver\\nimport android.content.Context\\nimport android.content.Intent\\nimport android.content.IntentFilter\\nimport android.net.wifi.WpsInfo\\nimport android.net.wifi.p2p.WifiP2pConfig\\nimport android.net.wifi.p2p.WifiP2pDevice\\nimport android.net.wifi.p2p.WifiP2pInfo\\nimport android.net.wifi.p2p.WifiP2pManager\\nimport android.util.Log\\nimport androidx.annotation.RequiresPermission\\n\\nclass WifiDirectManager(\\n private val context: Context,\\n private val listener: ConnectionListener\\n) : WifiP2pManager.ChannelListener {\\n\\n companion object {\\n private const val TAG = \\\"WifiDirectManager\\\"\\n }\\n\\n private val manager: WifiP2pManager =\\n context.getSystemService(Context.WIFI_P2P_SERVICE) as WifiP2pManager\\n private val channel: WifiP2pManager.Channel =\\n manager.initialize(context, context.mainLooper, this)\\n\\n private val receiver: BroadcastReceiver = object : BroadcastReceiver() {\\n @RequiresPermission(allOf = [Manifest.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION, Manifest.permission.NEARBY_WIFI_DEVICES])\\n override fun onReceive(context: Context, intent: Intent) {\\n when (intent.action) {\\n WifiP2pManager.WIFI_P2P_PEERS_CHANGED_ACTION -> {\\n manager.requestPeers(channel) { peerList ->\\n peerList.deviceList.forEach { device ->\\n Log.d(TAG, \\\"发现设备：${device.deviceName} (${device.deviceAddress})\\\")\\n listener.onDeviceFound(device)\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n WifiP2pManager.WIFI_P2P_CONNECTION_CHANGED_ACTION -> {\\n val info = intent.getParcelableExtra<WifiP2pInfo>(WifiP2pManager.EXTRA_WIFI_P2P_INFO)\\n if (info != null && info.groupFormed) {\\n if (info.isGroupOwner) {\\n Log.d(TAG, \\\"连接成功：我是 GO\\\")\\n } else {\\n Log.d(TAG, \\\"连接成功：我是 Client, GO IP = ${info.groupOwnerAddress?.hostAddress}\\\")\\n listener.onConnectionSuccess(info)\\n }\\n } else {\\n listener.onConnectionFailed()\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n interface ConnectionListener {\\n fun onDeviceFound(device: WifiP2pDevice)\\n fun onConnectionSuccess(info: WifiP2pInfo)\\n fun onConnectionFailed()\\n }\\n\\n init {\\n val intentFilter = IntentFilter().apply {\\n addAction(WifiP2pManager.WIFI_P2P_STATE_CHANGED_ACTION)\\n addAction(WifiP2pManager.WIFI_P2P_PEERS_CHANGED_ACTION)\\n addAction(WifiP2pManager.WIFI_P2P_CONNECTION_CHANGED_ACTION)\\n addAction(WifiP2pManager.WIFI_P2P_THIS_DEVICE_CHANGED_ACTION)\\n }\\n context.registerReceiver(receiver, intentFilter)\\n }\\n\\n @RequiresPermission(allOf = [Manifest.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION, Manifest.permission.NEARBY_WIFI_DEVICES])\\n fun discoverPeers() {\\n manager.discoverPeers(channel, object : WifiP2pManager.ActionListener {\\n override fun onSuccess() { Log.d(TAG, \\\"扫描启动成功\\\") }\\n override fun onFailure(reason: Int) { Log.e(TAG, \\\"扫描失败：$reason\\\") }\\n })\\n }\\n\\n @RequiresPermission(allOf = [Manifest.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION, Manifest.permission.NEARBY_WIFI_DEVICES])\\n fun connectToDevice(device: WifiP2pDevice) {\\n val config = WifiP2pConfig().apply {\\n deviceAddress = device.deviceAddress\\n wps.setup = WpsInfo.PBC // 关键：使用 PBC 方式，对应 Linux 的 wpa_cli pbc\\n // 如果使用 PIN 码：\\n // wps.setup = WpsInfo.KEYPAD\\n // wps.pin = \\\"12345678\\\"\\n }\\n\\n manager.connect(channel, config, object : WifiP2pManager.ActionListener {\\n override fun onSuccess() { Log.d(TAG, \\\"连接请求已发送\\\") }\\n override fun onFailure(reason: Int) { Log.e(TAG, \\\"连接请求失败：$reason\\\") }\\n })\\n }\\n\\n fun onDestroy() {\\n try {\\n context.unregisterReceiver(receiver)\\n } catch (e: Exception) {\\n Log.e(TAG, \\\"Receiver 注销失败\\\", e)\\n }\\n }\\n\\n override fun onChannelDisconnected() {\\n Log.e(TAG, \\\"WiFi Direct Channel 断开\\\")\\n }\\n}\\n... EOF no more lines ...\\n\", \"fileSize\": \"3.87 KB\", \"isBigFile\": false, \"totalLines\": 110}"}

{"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019cf66cb31277c98d3c26232601c610","conversation_id":"019cf60c46c17af1bdba0df94644be5e","content":"
很好！WifiDirectManager.kt 文件已经支持多设备扫描功能。从代码中可以看到：

1. 在 `WIFI_P2P_PEERS_CHANGED_ACTION` 处理中，它遍历 `peerList.deviceList.forEach` 并调用 `listener.onDeviceFound(device)` 对每个发现的设备进行回调
2. `connectToDevice` 方法接受一个 `WifiP2pDevice` 参数，可以连接指定的设备

这意味着 WifiDirectManager 已经支持多设备扫描和选择连接的功能，不需要修改。

现在让我检查一下是否有任何编译错误或需要优化的地方，然后完成任务。
"},"timestamp":1773660899,"type":"THINKING_TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

lint检查返回空数组，说明没有编译错误。现在让我总结一下完成的工作，然后使用attempt_completion工具来完成任务。

我已经成功完成了以下修改：
1. 修改了布局文件，添加了设备列表显示区域
2. 修改了MainActivity.kt，实现了多设备扫描、列表显示和选择连接功能
3. 确认WifiDirectManager.kt已经支持多设备功能，无需修改

功能现在支持：
- 扫描时显示所有发现的设备列表
- 用户可以从列表中选择要连接的设备
- 点击连接按钮连接选中的设备
"},"timestamp":1773660906,"type":"THINKING_TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}
